name: Contract
description: Pull parties, dates, governing law, and key obligations from any contract.
instructions:
Extract the following fields:

- contract_title (string)
- party_a_name (string)
- party_a_role (string)
- party_b_name (string)
- party_b_role (string)
- effective_date (date)
- expiry_date (date)
- governing_law (string)
- jurisdiction (string)
- payment_terms (string)
- confidentiality_clause (boolean)
- non_compete_clause (boolean)
- key_obligations (array of strings)
- termination_conditions (string)

Mark fields not present in the document as null.
